name: Reflex Plus Adult Dog Food Canned - Chicken Chunks in Gravy 0.4kg-Pack of 12

tags.name: Bulk Cat Food & Bulk Dog Food

shortDescription: Give your dog balanced nourishment with Reflex Plus Chicken Chunks in Gravy — a tasty, protein-rich canned food designed by experts to promote strength, energy, and wellbeing.
description: Reflex Plus Chicken Adult Dog Canned Food , fully-balanced, chicken protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 7.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 4.0 Crude Fiber (%) - 0.5 Moisture (%) - 80 Crude Ash (%) - 2.5 Vitamin A (Min) - 1600 IE/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) - 240 IE/kg Iron - 10 mg/kg Copper - 1.9 mg/kg Iodine - 0.4 mg/kg Manganese - 1.4 mg/kg Zinc - 21.0 mg/kg Selenium - 0.024 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (Chicken 4% min.), Cereals, Minerals, Colourants. MINERALS: Iron, Copper, Iodine, Manganese, Zinc, Selenium VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: See table below. Individual necessity depends on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. DOG SIZE (Cans per meal) Toy ( Small (5 -10 kg): 1 - 2 cans Medium (10 - 20 kg): 2 - 3 cans Large (20 - 35 kg): 3 - 5 cans
